{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Theluusian aurora toad
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Theluusian aurora toad]] is pure white with colors dancing on its skin like oil.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
